contextBlurb: Ohio has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 4 relate to moratoriums or prohibitions. 1 offers incentives or exemptions.

legislation.title: Prohibit new data center sales tax exemptions
legislation.summary: To amend section 122.175 of the Revised Code to prohibit new data center sales tax exemptions from being granted.

legislation.title: License artificial intelligence risk mitigation organizations

legislation.title: Regards an individual's persona usage; prohibit certain deepfakes
legislation.summary: To amend sections 2741.01, 2741.02, 2741.05, 2741.06, 2741.09, and 2905.11 and to enact sections 2742.01, 2742.02, 2742.03, and 2742.04 of the Revised Code to make changes to the law relating to the unauthorized use of an individual's persona and to prohibit certain unauthoriz...

legislation.title: Prohibit selling sensitive personal data for profit
legislation.summary: To amend sections 1347.01, 1347.10, and 1347.99 and to enact section 1347.072 of the Revised Code to prohibit various government and private entities from selling sensitive personal data to a data broker or private entity with the intent of generating profit, unless used for a...

legislation.title: Create the Data Center Study Commission
legislation.summary: To create the Data Center Study Commission.

legislation.title: Regards academic intervention, math improvement and intervention
legislation.summary: To amend sections 3301.0714, 3302.03, 3314.03, 3317.25, 3324.10, and 3326.11; to enact new section 3313.6032 and sections 3302.131, 3302.132, 3313.6034, 3313.6035, 3319.2214, and 3319.2311; and to repeal section 3313.6032 of the Revised Code with regard to academic interventio...

legislation.title: Regards the operation of public schools and the DEW
Prohibit public support, limit construction of, new data centers
legislation.summary: To amend section 163.01 and to enact sections 9.71, 9.711, and 4933.71 of the Revised Code to prohibit public support for, and limit the construction of, new data centers.

legislation.title: Enact the Responsible Water Use by Data Centers Act
legislation.summary: To amend sections 1521.01 and 1521.99 and to enact sections 9.72 and 1521.232 of the Revised Code regarding the withdrawal and consumptive use of water by data centers and to name the act the Responsible Water Use by Data Centers Act.

legislation.title: Impose certain minimum requirements on data center customers
legislation.summary: To enact sections 4934.01, 4934.02, 4934.03, 4934.04, 4934.05, 4934.06, 4934.07, 4934.08, 4934.09, 4934.10, 4934.11, and 4934.12 of the Revised Code to impose certain minimum requirements on data center customers in the state.

legislation.title: Require PUCO approval to connect data centers to electrical grid
Require data center water consumption reports
legislation.summary: To enact sections 9.484 and 1521.301 of the Revised Code to require data centers to report monthly and yearly water consumption and to prohibit data centers from including water consumption information in nondisclosure agreements with political subdivisions.
